case_title: MENLO WORLWIDE GOVERNMENT SERVICES, LLC VS. LIMITLESS INTERNATIONAL, INC.

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER MENLO WORLWIDE GOVERNMENT SERVICES, LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED NOTWITHSTANDING THAT THE HEARING HAD BEEN CONTINUED TO ENABLE RESPONDENT TO FILE OPPOSITION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PETITIONER MENLO WORLWIDE GOVERNMENT SERVICES, LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER MENLO WORLWIDE GOVERNMENT SERVICES, LLC'S POST-JUDGMENT MOTION FOR AWARD OF ATTORNEY FEES ($14,548.50) IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT VACATED THE TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER MENLO WORLWIDE GOVERNMENT SERVICES, LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONTINUED TO MAY 3, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302 TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE MCBRIDE FOR APPEARANCE OF COUNSEL FOR RESPONDENT LIMITLESS INTERNATIONAL OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. PARTIES WAIVE NOTICE. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; COURT REPORTER: TEANNA WARD, CSR # 11918

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Post-Judgment Motion For Award Of Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Aug-27-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. LORI MOODY OF THE HANSON BRIDGETT LAW OFFICE, TEL. NO. (916) 491-3036 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER MENLO WORLWIDE GOVERNMENT SERVICES, LLC'S Post-Judgment Motion For Award Of Attorney Fees ($14,548.50) is Granted.
No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976 =(302/MJM)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar May-03-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
William Taylor, Esq., from Hanson & Bridgett LLP, 916-442-3333, for petitioner and moving party
Heather D. Volante, Esq., Law Office, 415-563-7226, for respondent and opposing party

Attorney for respondent did not give notice of her intentions to appear for this hearing.
Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER MENLO WORLWIDE GOVERNMENT SERVICES, LLC'S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed notwithstanding that the hearing had been continued to enable respondent to file opposition. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-16-2012 Continued To May-03-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Christina Nugent, Esq., of Hanson Bridgett, Tel. 916.551.2928, appearing for Petitioner and moving party.
Cheryl A. Stockstad of Limitless International, Inc., Tel. 407.506.3260, appearing via court call.

The matter was discussed. The court vacated the tentative ruling. PETITIONER MENLO WORLWIDE GOVERNMENT SERVICES, LLC'S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is continued to May 3, 2012 at 9:30 AM in Department 302 to be heard by Judge McBride for appearance of counsel for Respondent Limitless International or the motion will be granted. Parties waive notice. Judge: James J. McBride; Court Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR # 11918
